column8: 'When did your brother join the army?' Rudy asked me. Rudy asked me_______________the army.
column9: 'How was your trip to Turkey?' I asked Katherine. I asked Katherine how______________been.
column10: 'How will we find your keys in the dark?' Ashley asked Susie. Ashley asked Susie_____________keys in the dark.
column11: 'Why was Rob on TV?' Denise asked me. Danice asked me_____________on TV.
column12: "Who saw you at park?' the police officer asked me. The police officer asked me____________at the park.
column13: "Who did you see at the park?' the police officer asked me. The police officer asked me____________at the park.
